title: Post Pregnancy Shelter/Transitional Housing - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Post Pregnancy Shelter/Transitional Housing 6 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES OF THE MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY AND CENTRAL COAST FATHER TAAFFE HOMES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides maternity homes and transitional housing services. 3737 Portland Road NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Pregnant or parenting women ages 13-20 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm by appointment only Email (503) 508-3030 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GRANDMA'S HOUSE OF CENTRAL OREGON GRANDMA'S HOUSE MATERNITY HOME SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Emergency and transitional shelter for pregnant and parenting youth and their children who are experiencing homeless or at risk of being homeless. Eligibility: Houseless youth ages 12-24 who are pregnant, experienced a miscarriage, interested in adoption, or have a child under the age of 5 Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Shelter: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 383-3515 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MAGDALENE HOME Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Full-time residential care for pregnant and parenting young mothers and their children. Provides life skills training and access to essential services. Assists residents in applying for TANF, OHP, SNAP (food stamps), and other needed services. All furnishings are provided, including bedding. Donations of clothing are made available to residents and their children. 12 Black Oak Drive Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Female, pregnant and/or parenting, and between the ages of 14-24. Residents must attend school or otherwise progress in their education or work. Residents within the age range may stay as long as they wish, provided they follow Magdalene Home's rules for wholesome living. Residents choosing adoption may stay for up to 6 months following the adoption. Mothers who are under the guidance of DHS Child Welfare are welcome. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 773-5040 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OUTSIDE IN YOUTH HOUSING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides on-site and community-supported housing, case management, and other support services. A few transitional housing units may be available for the homeless, parenting youth. Transitional housing is from 6-24 months. Parents with children are accepted for housing case management and transitional housing services and must participate in parent support case management. 1132 SW 13th Avenue Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: -Homeless youth ages 18-24 -Some units available for parents age 18-24 with children under age 4 -Services are not for individuals passing through on travel Hours: Access Center: 7 days per week 8am-6pm Day Program Drop-In: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-10am,1pm-2pm and 5pm-6pm, Tuesday/Thursday 9am-10am and 1pm-6pm, Sunday 1pm-6pm Email (503) 535-3800 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRANSITIONAL YOUTH YOUTH DEVELOPMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Supervised home for pregnant and parenting teens. Assists homeless teen mothers and their children by providing a supportive environment and teaching life skills to become self-sufficient while completing their high school education or equivalent. Eligibility: Pregnant and parenting females ages 18-24 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 350-7215 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES OF THE MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY AND CENTRAL COAST FATHER TAAFFE HOMES MAGDALENE HOME MAGDALENE HOME OUTSIDE IN YOUTH HOUSING PROGRAM
